products.name: Celestial Starlet Chain
products.description: A delicate, sparkling chain dotted with miniature star charms. Made from premium sterling silver with a thick 18k rose gold plating. Catching light from every angle, this fancy chain is perfect for layering.

products.name: Meadow Dainty Flower Bracelet
products.description: Add a touch of whimsical spring to your wrist. Features hand-painted enamel floral charms and delicate pastel crystals. Adjustable clasp ensures a perfect fit.

products.name: Glimmering Dewdrop Waist Chain
products.description: An elegant waist chain designed to complement crop styles or swim aesthetics. Shimmering beads cascade gently, adding sparkle to your stride.

products.name: Sweetheart Double-Layer Anklet
products.description: Double the charm with this two-strand anklet. One layer is a sleek cable chain, and the second holds tiny sweetheart charm drops. Light, fancy, and fun.

products.name: Starlight Firefly Ring
products.description: A cluster of brilliant marquise-cut gems mimicking the glow of fireflies under the stars. Set on a slender, adjustable band. A fancy statement ring.

products.name: Chic Flutter Butterfly Nose Pin
products.description: A dazzling butterfly nose stud made with delicate rose-cut zircon wings. Hypoallergenic, comfortable, and designed to add a fancy shimmer to your face.

products.name: Whisper Heart Chain Choker
products.description: A choker necklace that hugs the collarbone with subtle micro heart charms. A fancy and minimalist option that goes with everything from tees to gowns.

products.name: Ocean Breeze Anklet
products.description: Inspired by shoreline treasures. Features genuine freshwater pearls and miniature teal turquoise beads on a gold-finished chain. Perfect for sunny days.

products.name: Classic Twist Stackable Ring Set
products.description: Three slender stackable rings in silver, gold, and rose gold plating. Features a twisted rope texture that sparkles in the light. Wear them stacked or spread across fingers.
